LanguageData.VHGE_GasCooler.description: An air-cooling machine that releases cooled air around itself. Can be used to create a walk-in freezer. Cannot be adjusted and will automatically lower temperature slightly below zero.
LanguageData.VHGE_GasCooler.label: gas cooler
LanguageData.VHGE_GasHeater.description: A device that converts helixien gas into radiated heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature.
LanguageData.VHGE_GasHeater.label: gas heater
